prompt: I'm working in the advanced/ folder of the distillation project. Can you look at distill_advanced.py and tell me what needs to be fixed before I start training?
assertions: Mentions minilm_relation_heads startup validation as a needed fix
Mentions attention output / attn_implementation validation as a needed fix
Mentions missing __init__.py or namespace package issue
Provides specific code snippets or exact fix instructions (not just high-level description)
References specific file paths and approximate line numbers
